summary: Plan-mode classification only. #78754 remains the best live canonical for the external openclaw-weixin cron announce delivery failure. #78978 is the focused contributor fix attempt for the same issue, but it is already closed, unmerged, uneditable by maintainers, and blocked by failed real-behavior proof, so it should stay closed as historical evidence. Linked closed refs are related context only; no security-sensitive item and no mutation, merge, or fix artifact is planned.

actions.reason: The representative is still open and carries the active root-cause thread; no other open candidate is a better canonical.
Already-closed PRs must not receive close or merge actions; keep it as related source-credit evidence for any future repair.
Closed historical context only; no closure action is valid.
Merged historical PR is useful evidence but not a live candidate or duplicate target.
Closed related context only; do not reopen or close as part of this plan-mode cluster.
